text.title: Test Fixtures Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to emit a fixture-design config from a model inventory.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Inventory models. Parse `templates/_smoke-test.yaml` (or the project's model-inventory.yaml). Per model record: has_subobjects, has_many_optional_fields, domain_scenarios_named, reuse_count.
Step 2 — Pick pattern. Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml` per model. Leaves: r-factory-pick / r-builder-pick / r-mother-pick (or factory+mother combo).
Step 3 — Assign scope. All stateful fixtures → function scope (r1). Module/session only for immutable resources (parsed schema, opened TCP connection). yield-fixtures only (r2).

Step 4 — Wire rollback + xdist. transactional rollback by default; truncate only if commit-time semantics are under test. If xdist_workers>1, set xdist_db_strategy=worker-db and uniqueness=uuid (r5, r6).

Step 5 — Emit conftest + factories. Drop `templates/conftest-transactional.py` + `templates/factory-boy-factory.py` into the project at conftest_path. Document every autouse with a docstring (r7). Run `scripts/validate-test-fixtures.py config.json`.
